title: Pokémon Field Lab
description: A questing mod for cobblemon. Fetching mons for rewards.
body:
# Pokémon Field Lab
A mod that extends Cobblemon by adding a placeable quest-giving block named **Poké-Field Lab (PFL)**. This block provides Pokémon-themed fetch quests ("errands") unique to each player. Players fulfil quests by submitting qualifying Pokémon. Rewards scale based on the rarity and specificity of the quest criteria.
